title: admin_payload_variant_field may have outdated field number ranges
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:658-671

The admin_payload_variant_field function hardcodes Meshtastic AdminMessage field number ranges:
  return (field >= 1U && field <= 8U) ||
         (field >= 10U && field <= 27U) ||
         (field >= 32U && field <= 49U) ||
         (field >= 64U && field <= 67U) ||
         (field >= 94U && field <= 100U) ||
         (field >= ADMIN_OTA_REQUEST_FIELD && field <= ADMIN_LOCKDOWN_AUTH_FIELD);

These ranges must match the Meshtastic proto definition (referenced at line 29: LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_PROTOBUF_COMMIT).

If Meshtastic adds new admin fields outside these ranges, they won't be recognized as variant fields, potentially causing incorrect parsing behavior.

Fix: Add a comment documenting which proto version these ranges correspond to, or generate these ranges from the proto definition.
notes: Comment updated to document protobuf commit 032b7dfd68e875c4323e6ac67590c6fc616b1714. The ranges match the pinned Meshtastic admin.proto. Commit: 7af20eab9
close_reason: Comment documenting the pinned protobuf commit added to admin_payload_variant_field. Ranges now explicitly tied to LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_PROTOBUF_COMMIT.
